title: EVO-STIK Wood Glue Exterior, Weatherproof, Extra Strong, Fast Setting, Dries Clear, 500ml & EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior, Extra Strong, Fast Setting, Suitable For All Wood Types, Dries Clear, 500ml
features: Product 1: Fast setting, extra strong, interior and exterior adhesive that dries to form a bond stronger that the wood itself
Product 1: Suitable for all wood types
Product 2: Dries to a clear finish.
Product 2: Can be sanded, painted or stained.
Product 2: Full bond strength will be achieved in 24 hours.
Product 2: Fast setting, extra strong, interior adhesive that dries to form a bond stronger that the wood itself
description: From the manufacturer EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Exterior Fast-setting wood adhesive for interior and exterior use EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Exterior is a fast setting, extra strong adhesive that forms a bond stronger than the wood itself! Suitable for internal and external use on all wood types, the adhesive is non-flammable and dries to a clear, translucent finish that can be sanded, painted or stained. Suitable use & materials EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Exterior is designed for interior and exterior use and is suitable for all wood types: it bonds wood, hardboard, chipboard, blockboard, cardboard, paper and textiles. Advantages at a glance EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Exterior EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior Suitable for all wood types Suitable for all wood types Superior strength Superior strength Fast setting Fast setting Forms a bond stronger than the wood itself Forms a bond stronger than the wood itself Complies with EN204 type D3, ideal for outdoor jobs Complies with EN204 type D1 ideal for indoor jobs Dries to a clear finish Dries to a clear finish 500ML500ml EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior Water-based wood adhesive for interior use EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior is a fast setting, extra strong adhesive that forms a bond stronger than the wood itself! Suitable for internal use on all wood types, the adhesive is non-flammable and dries to a clear, translucent finish. EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior may be used for the assembly of frames for doors, windows, drawers and many other applications. In addition, it is suitable for making mortice and tenon, dowelled, and other standard woodworking joints. Suitable use & materials EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior may be used for the assembly of frames for doors, windows, drawers, etc. It is suitable for making mortice and tenon, dowelled, and other standard woodworking joints, as well as bonding wood veneers and laminated plastics to wood or chipboard cores. It may also be used for bonding rigid PVC or aluminium edge trim sections to recessed wood for internal use.
